/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/tcl-tk/lib -o libsndfileplugin.dylib -install_name @rpath/libsndfileplugin.dylib CMakeFiles/sndfileplugin.dir/sndfileplugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sndfileplugin.dir/__/__/src/audiodecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sndfileplugin.dir/__/__/src/audioparameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sndfileplugin.dir/audiodecoder_sndfile.cpp.o -iframework /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/Cellar/libsndfile/1.2.2_1/lib/libsndfile.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
